message:
feat(fwc): add agent session management CLI with resumable context persistence

Adds a full 'fwc session' subcommand family so agents can track their
active session, persist resumable context across rotations, and cleanly
hand off state between agent identities working on the same fleet.

main.rs (+851 lines):
- SessionArgs, SessionCommand enum (Start, List, Show, End, Resume)
- SessionStartArgs: --agent, --goal, --zone, --context key=value
- SessionListArgs: --status filter, --limit
- SessionTargetArgs: optional session_id defaulting to active
- session_dispatch(): full dispatch with store integration, automatic
  pause of previous active session on start, lock tracking, structured
  JSON payloads with next_actions guidance
- session_detail_value/session_summary_value: rich JSON projections
  with context entries, lock counts, and timing metadata
- parse_session_context_binding/parse_session_status_filter: input
  validation with actionable error messages
- Wired into Commands enum and dispatch() router
- Fixed serve-mcp error reference passing (&error, &[...] instead of
  owned copies)

session.rs:
- resume() now clears ended_at timestamp so resumed sessions don't
  carry stale end times

catalog.rs (+58 lines):
- CommandClassification for "session": OfflineArtifact, LocalOnly,
  no auth required, unaffected by host absence
- Added "session" to COMMANDS list
- command_contract: workflow contract with session-specific description
- Test import reorganization (sorted, removed unused AdminIntrospection
  and TemplateProvenance)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -99,6 +99,15 @@ pub const COMMAND_CLASSIFICATIONS: &[CommandClassification] = &[
         may_need_approval: false,
         transport_note: "Local workflow capsule management",
     },
+    CommandClassification {
+        command: "session",
+        truth_source: CommandTruthSource::OfflineArtifact,
+        execution_mode: CommandExecutionMode::LocalOnly,
+        host_absent: HostAbsentBehavior::Unaffected,
+        requires_capability_token: false,
+        may_need_approval: false,
+        transport_note: "Local agent session state persisted under ~/.fwc/sessions",
+    },
     CommandClassification {
         command: "plan",
         truth_source: CommandTruthSource::OfflineArtifact,
@@ -2881,6 +2890,7 @@ pub fn evidence_bundle_metadata(
 pub const COMMANDS: &[&str] = &[
     "guide",
     "task",
+    "session",
     "plan",
     "explain",
     "do",
@@ -3111,6 +3121,10 @@ fn command_contract(command: &str) -> Option<Value> {
             "Create and resume durable workflow capsules for connector jobs.",
             "A resumable capsule view over compiled intent, bindings, approvals, and execution receipts so agents can operate on a short task id instead of replaying the full workflow from scratch.",
         )),
+        "session" => Some(workflow_contract(
+            "Track the current agent session and persist resumable context.",
+            "A local session ledger over agent identity, goal, zone binding, active locks, and operation counts so context survives agent rotations.",
+        )),
         "plan" => Some(intent_contract(
             "Compile a natural-language goal into explicit primitive `fwc` steps.",
             "Transparent workflow plan with connector inference, operation hints, ambiguities, missing information, and exact next commands.",
@@ -3370,36 +3384,36 @@ fn execution_contract(summary: &str, intended_shape: &str) -> Value {
